title: Registering for charitable or qualified donee status - Canada.ca
content:
## Registering for charitable or other qualified donee status
Information for organizations seeking registration as a charity or other qualified donee.

## Services and information

### Apply to become a registered charity
Make an informed decision, set up your organization, apply, and our review process

### Apply for other qualified donee status
Application process and the criteria needed to apply

### Apply to register your revoked charity
Find out if you can re-apply for registration, depending on the reasons for revocation and date of revocation

### Disaster or emergency relief
For organizations who would like to help following the news of a disaster or emergency

### Find guidance and policies
Policies and guidance containing technical information

### Objections and appeals
How to file an objection or appeal
- Canada Revenue Agency

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
